problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
